hooks.command: jq -r '.name // .summary // .agentName // "work"' | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9 -]//g; s/^ *//; s/ *$//; s/ /-/g; s/--*/-/g' | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | head -c 50 | { read branch; [ -n "$branch" ] || branch="work"; echo "Creating branch: $branch"; git checkout -b "$branch" 2>/dev/null || git checkout "$branch" 2>/dev/null || echo "Failed to create/switch branch: $branch"; }
